overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in traditional Middle Eastern robes poling a wooden boat through a historic canal city. The character navigates through narrow waterways lined with mud-brick buildings and palm trees, passing under wooden and stone bridges while encountering other boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic canal waterway with merchant docks

events.description: boat passes underneath wooden footbridge with netting sides

agents.ego_description: character stands in boat using long wooden pole to push off canal bottom, propelling forward through the waterway

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge with rope netting sides spanning the canal
tan-colored mud brick structures with small windows lining the left canal bank
weathered stone and mud brick buildings with wooden balconies on the right
tall date palm trees rising above the building rooftops
large wooden merchant vessel moored along the right bank with cargo
teal-colored canvas shade stretched between buildings
burgundy-colored fabric canopy over a dock entrance
natural stone outcroppings along the waterline on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a robed character poling a small wooden boat through a narrow canal in a historic Middle Eastern city. The waterway is flanked by mud-brick buildings with colorful fabric awnings and palm trees, with large wooden merchant boats docked along the sides. The character approaches and passes underneath a rustic wooden footbridge around the 14-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal passing between rocky banks and historic bridges

events.description: small rowboat with NPC passes by on the left side of the canal
boat enters the shadow of the large stone arch bridge ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to pole the boat forward, navigating between other small watercraft in the canal

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting in a small green rowboat, poling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large historic stone bridge with single arch and weathered surface, covered in vines
small wooden fishing boat with a seated figure holding a pole
rickety wooden pier extending into the water from the right bank

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wooden bridge, the boat continues through a section of canal lined with rock formations and approaches a prominent stone arch bridge. The character passes another small boat with an NPC around 25 seconds, then enters the shadow of the large stone bridge around 30 seconds. The mud-brick buildings continue along both banks with palm trees visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal with merchant scaffolding and construction

events.description: emerges from under the stone arch bridge into a new canal section
passes another small boat with an NPC poling in the same direction

agents.ego_description: poling the boat past wooden scaffolding and merchant stalls, navigating through slightly busier waterway traffic

notable_agents.action: NPC character poling a small boat loaded with green cargo, moving parallel to the ego boat

entered.detail: tall wooden construction scaffolding attached to the right bank buildings
small market stall with green fabric covering on the left bank
tall slender tower visible in the distance above the rooftops
decorative string of small flags or lanterns stretched across the canal
second small boat with a figure poling, carrying green covered goods

segments.scene_description: After passing under the stone bridge, the canal opens slightly to reveal merchant stalls with green awnings and wooden scaffolding on the right bank. The character continues poling forward, passing under decorative hanging lanterns and approaching another small boat with an NPC around 48 seconds. The distant minaret of a mosque becomes visible on the horizon as the boat progresses through the historic waterway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow historic canal that gradually opens into a bustling merchant district. It begins by following a robed character poling a wooden boat past mud-brick buildings and colorful fabric awnings, moving steadily toward a rustic wooden footbridge. As the boat passes under the bridge, the waterway shifts toward a section lined with rock formations and a prominent stone arch, where the camera glides past another small boat and enters the deep shadow of the masonry. The scene then expands as the boat emerges from the bridge into a wider canal featuring merchant stalls with green awnings and decorative hanging lanterns. Finally, the camera continues forward past another NPC in a boat, revealing the distant minaret of a mosque on the horizon.
